steps.title: Find the weighted total
steps.content:
Multiply each mass by its frequency, then add the products.
$$10(12)+20(6)+30(8)+40(9)=120+120+240+360=840$$

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content:
There are $35$ objects, so divide the total mass by $35$.
$$\frac{840}{35}=24$$
The answer is 24.
